hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git (commit|push)'; then echo ''; echo '📡 WIKI CHECK — Does this change affect any wiki pages?'; echo '   Review: wiki/index.md → auth/ agents/ tasks/ audit/ news/ skills/ mcp/ cli/'; echo '   If a subsystem\'s behavior, data model, or API surface changed, update the wiki.'; echo ''; fi
